About

I am a Certified Bookkeeper and Accounting Information System graduate with hands-on experience in bookkeeping, financial documentation, audit support, and data entry. I am skilled in QuickBooks, Xero, and Excel, and I value accuracy, organization, and ethical financial reporting.

My academic background, leadership experience, and OJT exposure at the Commission on Audit helped strengthen my analytical thinking, attention to detail, and understanding of financial accountability.

Profile Snapshot

  • Certified Bookkeeper
  • B.S. in Accounting Information System Graduate
  • QuickBooks, Xero, and Excel Certified
  • Bookkeeping and Data Entry Specialist
  • ESL Teaching Professional

What I Can Help With

Bookkeeping and Financial Support

Support daily financial transactions, invoice processing, account reconciliation, and organized financial records.

Reporting and Data Management

Prepare clear financial reports and manage data entry tasks with accuracy using QuickBooks, Xero, and Excel.

Audit and Compliance Assistance

Assist with documentation, working papers, and review processes that support transparency and accountability.

ESL Teaching Support

Deliver learner-focused English instruction with structured feedback and adaptable teaching methods.

  • QuickBooks

Languages

English, Filipino

Experience

Bookkeeper

2022 - 2024

Tudela, Misamis Occidental

Managed daily financial transactions, prepared financial statements, processed invoices, and reconciled accounts. Monitored budgets, assisted in payroll, and provided insights for financial decision-making using QuickBooks and Excel.

Acadsoc ESL Teacher

2024 - 2025

Online

Delivered one-on-one online English lessons to students of varying age groups, primarily from China. Created engaging, level-appropriate lesson plans aligned with CEFR standards. Assessed student performance and provided feedback to support language development. Adapted teaching methods to individual learner needs and maintained a positive learning environment with effective communication, patience, and cultural sensitivity.

OJT - Provincial Satellite Auditing Office, Commission on Audit

February 2025 - April 2025

IBJT Compound, Carangan, Ozamiz City, Misamis Occidental

Reviewed financial documents, prepared audit working papers, and supported compliance with government regulations. This experience strengthened her analytical skills, attention to detail, and understanding of public sector audit procedures while deepening her appreciation for transparency, accuracy, and ethical standards in government financial reporting.

Leadership - La Salle University, Commission on Audit

2021 - 2025

Valconcha Street 7200, Ozamiz, Misamis Occidental

Assisted in auditing financial transactions of college departments and student organizations. Reviewed compliance, supported audit reporting, and helped ensure accountability in public expenditures.

La Salle University - Ozamiz
